title: gastrodia elata
intro: Gastrodia elata, also known as Chinese gastrodia or Tiger's Lily, is a rare and endangered orchid native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and anti-convulsant properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as epilepsy, fever, and rheumatism. The health benefits of Gastrodia elata include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and providing antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, Gastrodia elata is often combined with other herbs and used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments, including neurological disorders and respiratory issues.
